mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE feature_type = 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AND status = 'FAILED'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application_case ac INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fit_analysis f WHERE f.application_case_id = ac.id)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE fa.created_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE fa.status != 'SUCCESS' AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT memo.fit_analysis_id) FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo INNER JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = memo.fit_analysis_id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE memo.memo_type = 'REANALYSIS' AND memo.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM career_analysis_run run INNER JOIN users ON users.id = run.user_id WHERE run.status != 'SUCCESS' AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN fit_analysis_gate_result gr ON gr.fit_analysis_id = fa.id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE gr.gate_status = 'REVIEW_REQUIRED' AND gr.review_status = 'PENDING' AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id )
